name: Harley
intro: Harley, the Mage Genius, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Magic Master
abilities.description: Debuff Harley's mastery of magic allows his Basic Attack to deal 60 (+50%Total Physical Attack) (+60%Total Magic Power) Magic Damage . His attacks reduce the enemy's Magic Defense by 2 for 3 seconds on hit (up to 10 stacks). Skill terms Magic Basic Attack Deal Magic DMG to enemies. It can trigger ATK Effect and Magic Lifesteal.

abilities.name: Poker Trick
abilities.description: AOE Buff Harley throws 3-5 waves of cards in the target direction, each dealing 130-210 (+25%Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to the first enemy hit and granting him 10% extra Attack Speed for 3 seconds on hit (up to 5-10 stacks). Enemies hit more than 3 times will take less damage from subsequent hits. Skill terms Magic Damage Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. ATK Speed It determines the attacking times (capped at 3 times) per second. Total current ATK Speed = Basic ATK Speed + Extra ATK Speed × ATK Speed Coefficient.

abilities.name: Space Escape
abilities.description: Mobility Speed Up Harley blinks in the designated direction, leaving a magic hat at his place, increasing his Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds. Use Again: Use again within 4 seconds to return where the hat is and lose the speed boost. Skill terms Blink Movement ability that can pass through obstacles. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).

abilities.name: Deadly Magic
abilities.description: Burst Slow A single spark can start a praine fire Harley casts a magic ring of fire at the target enemy hero (can be blocked by other heroes), dealing them 200-400 (+60%Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and slowing them by 40% for 1.5 seconds. The magic ring stays around the enemy for 4 seconds, during which Harley can hit the magic ring to damage the enemy with his skills. The magic ring will explode at the end of the duration, dealing 100-200 (+30%Total Magic Power) plus 50% of the enemy's damage taken within the duration as Magic Damage. Skill terms Magic Damage Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).

abilities.name: Harley buff
abilities.description: Increases both HP by 10 when battling with Lesley [.]
